query:
SELECT v.nome, mt.metaTrimestral, mt.superMeta, mt.bonusMeta, mt.bonusSuperMeta, mt.metaAgencia 
FROM metas_trimestrais mt 
JOIN vendedores v ON mt.vendedorId = v.id 
WHERE mt.trimestre = 'Meta Trimestral 1' 
ORDER BY v.nome 
LIMIT 5
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user pKThLpGXzdZkTAu.ac53d9f9167d --database jUteHPSJGShqbZJcfArKWy --execute SELECT v.nome, mt.metaTrimestral, mt.superMeta, mt.bonusMeta, mt.bonusSuperMeta, mt.metaAgencia 
FROM metas_trimestrais mt 
JOIN vendedores v ON mt.vendedorId = v.id 
WHERE mt.trimestre = 'Meta Trimestral 1' 
ORDER BY v.nome 
LIMIT 5
